framework.name: Graduated Discount Approval Authority
framework.description: Three-tier approval system (sales reps/managers, pricing analysts, pricing manager) with clear escalation guidelines based on discount depth. Speeds transaction approval while maintaining control. Exception codes track reasons for deviations and accountability.
framework.raw_quote: The project team proposed giving graduated discount-approval authority to individuals in three levels of the organization's hierarchy: sales reps or managers, pricing analysts and the pricing manager. Making the guidelines and the escalation process clear sped up the transaction process.

source.title: Improving Pricing Quality with Six Sigma Methods
